title: Digital Arts Exploration – Youth Maker XD Camp Experience
description: Camp participants will be designing and creating an LED Laser Cut projects using both 3d and 2d items from leather, wood, MDF, acrylic, and or fabric. title: Little Feat: The Last Farewell
location: 314 W. Main Street Grass Valley, CA
description: Their inimitable blend of rock, New Orleans swamp boogie, jazz, and blues is not only unique but an ongoing source of delight. But it’s time to give the trusty tour bus, however comfy, a rest.

title: Playwriting Group
description: All playwrights welcome! Whether playwriting is new to you or you're already an accomplished playwright, come join this on-going bi-weekly writers' group. title: Springtime at Ananda
description: Visitors are once again invited to enjoy the color and serenity of 20,000 tulips in bloom for Springtime.

title: Nevada City's Hot Summer Nights
description: Hot Summer Nights in Nevada City is the premier summer festival in Nevada City. Held the last three Wednesday evenings in July, it features live music, vendors, and classic cars.

title: First Friday Art Walks
description: Nevada City’s thriving arts community comes alive during First Friday Artwalk. Local artisan boutiques, shops, wine tasting rooms, and eateries feature local artists at live events throughout the evening. The event showcases both established and emerging artists, creating space for engagement betwee

title: City-wide Sidewalk Sale
description: Join our merchants for great deals--plus vendors and music from 10am-5pm

title: Nevada City Fall Colors
description: The Nevada City-Grass Valley area is one of California’s best areas to view autumn foliage. The best fall colors are located in the old-fashioned Victorian neighborhoods surrounding the downtown historic districts.

title: Nevada City Victorian Christmas
description: Welcome the holiday season in historic Nevada City, a quaint Gold Rush town, where each year the town’s picturesque downtown transforms into a genuine Christmas card come to life.
